texto: Everything else - music, cinematography, costumes, design, acting - can be judged at face value. But when you're looking at editing, you don't know what the totality of the material was, and you don't know the working dynamic between a director and an editor - whether the editor was micromanaged or given free rein. It's very difficult.
explicacao: Citação de Christopher Rouse sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Everything else - music, cinematography, costumes, design, acting - can be judged at face value. …” articula trabalho, music, value em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e value.
